info.name: ActaCofrade API
info.description: Suite de regresion completa para el backend de ActaCofrade. Incluye auth, roles, eventos, tareas, decisiones, incidencias, exportacion, cierre y casos limite.

item.name: 0. Setup
item.description: Inicializa el sufijo unico, registra el administrador y provisiona los usuarios de los demas roles.

exec: pm.test('Token returned and roles include ADMINISTRADOR', () => {
pm.test('Returns 401 or 403 when token is missing', () => {
pm.test('Returns 401 or 403 when token is invalid', () => {
pm.test('Returns 401 or 403 when token is expired/invalid', () => {

item.name: 2. Roles & Permissions
item.description: Valida acciones permitidas y prohibidas por rol.

exec: pm.test('Only ADMINISTRADOR may edit hermandad', () => pm.response.to.have.status(403));
pm.test('Status REJECTED-like (treated as completed for close)', () => pm.expect(pm.response.json().status).to.match(/REJECT|RECHAZ/));
pm.test('CONSULTA may export (read-only) or is forbidden', () => pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.oneOf([200, 403]));

item.name: 10. Close validation
item.description: Validacion estricta del cierre de actos: con pendientes 409, despues de completar/rechazar todo 200.

exec: pm.test('Cannot close while pending items exist', () => pm.response.to.have.status(409));
pm.test('Event closes when no pending items', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test('Returns 400 or 403 when current password is wrong', () => pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.oneOf([400, 403]));

item.name: Cross-event - task from other event id

exec: pm.test('Returns 404 because task does not belong to event', () => pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.oneOf([404,403]));
pm.test('SQL injection harmless (200 with no leak)', () => pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.eql(200));
